message:
refactor(workflows): extract engine and runner to submodules [ft-c45am]

Extracts Workflow Execution State (~713 lines) to engine.rs and
WorkflowRunner (~1984 lines) to runner.rs.

mod.rs now contains only imports, module declarations, and tests (~11,019 lines).
Production code reduced from 21,626 lines to ~72 lines in mod.rs.

Total extraction: ~10,607 production code lines moved to 12 submodules:
- account_steps.rs, builtin_workflows.rs, codex_exit.rs, context.rs,
  coordination.rs, descriptors.rs, engine.rs, handlers.rs, lock.rs,
  plan_helpers.rs, runner.rs, step_results.rs, traits.rs, wait_execution.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
